rules.rule: A component must render UI. Its primary output is JSX.
A component must receive data through props unless it is an approved page-level container or application shell.
A component must not call brokers or make HTTP requests directly.
A component must not call foundation services directly.
A component must not embed business rule conditionals in JSX. Business-meaning values must come from view model fields.
A component must be small enough to understand at a glance. Mixed data loading, transformation, event orchestration, and rendering requires splitting.
Non-trivial components must define a typed prop model.
A component must not duplicate state that already exists in a parent, page hook, or view model.
Interactive elements must use semantic HTML and be keyboard accessible.
